---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `kirograph ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **KiroGraph version**: (`kirograph --version`)
- **Node.js version**: (`node --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.1, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **IDE**: (e.g., Kiro, VS Code + Claude, Cursor)
- **Semantic engine**: (e.g., cosine, orama, qdrant)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
